channel.title: NYT > Technology
channel.description: Technology industry news, commentary, and analysis, with reporting on big tech, startups, and internet culture. The New York Times is a hub for conversation about news and ideas.

item.title: New Super PAC, the Guardrails Alliance, Aims to Rally Tech Workers to Help Limit A.I.
item.description: The Guardrails Alliance, which has raised $5 million, is positioning itself as a populist effort that will take on the pro-A.I. interests trying to influence this year’s elections.
item.dc:creator: Mike Isaac and Theodore Schleifer

media:content.media:credit: Tierney L. Cross for The New York Times
media:content.media:description: Shaunna Thomas is a founder of the Guardrails Alliance, a new super PAC trying to take on moneyed entities that oppose reining in artificial intelligence.
